summary_one_line: PNG with IHDR color_type=2 (RGB) plus a tRNS chunk so num_trans!=0 and PNG_EXPAND_tRNS gets set.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A PNG whose IHDR color_type byte at file offset 0x19 is 0x02 (truecolor RGB, non-palette) AND which carries a tRNS chunk (so png_ptr->num_trans becomes non-zero and libpng turns on PNG_EXPAND_tRNS). The blocker is inside the else-branch at line 4790, so PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE is excluded; the surrounding gates also require PNG_EXPAND to be active. Color_type 0x02 reaches the else and tRNS sets num_trans, simultaneously satisfying both CMP operands of the &&.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry IHDR color_type=0x02 at offset 0x19 and reach line 4794 (the W-only true-side body). Their ancestry includes a ParentInfo-only dash row, the I2S-floor signal that I2SRandReplace produced an input matching the const-byte/const-mask compares in this gate.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The naive loser seeds vary color_type at 0x19 across {0x00 grayscale, 0x06 RGBA, 0x04 gray+alpha} and never lock onto 0x02; they take the else-false path at line 4797 (L-only line), and their grayscale low-bit-depth inputs are pulled into png_do_unpack (199 invocations W=0). Naive has no I2S/CMP introspection, only blind havoc on the color_type byte.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: Both winners (cmplog and value_profile_cmplog) carry I2SRandReplace in their mutator stack. The blocker is a conjunction of two equality/mask CMPs against compile-time constants (num_trans!=0 and a fixed bitmask PNG_EXPAND_tRNS), and the upstream IHDR color_type check at line 4772 is also a constant-equality CMP. cmplog logs those operands during execution and I2SRandReplace substitutes the matching constant directly at the dataflow offset, while naive and pure value_profile must stumble onto color_type=0x02 plus tRNS-chunk via havoc — a low-probability joint event that explains the 0/10 and 2/10 resolve rates respectively.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is a conjunction comparing num_trans against a constant and a transformations flag against the bitmask PNG_EXPAND_tRNS.
The second conjunct masks the transformations field with PNG_EXPAND_tRNS.
The blocker sits inside the non-palette else-branch, so PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE inputs cannot reach it.
All five winner seeds carry IHDR color_type byte 0x02 at offset 0x19 of the PNG.
Loser seeds use color_type values {0x00 grayscale, 0x06 RGBA, 0x04 gray+alpha} at 0x19, never converging on 0x02.
On the W trace, the true side of the blocker fires 251 times while L takes the false side 460 times, confirming the dataflow flip.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L4792  T=251 F=0  T=0 F=460  if (png_ptr->num_trans != 0 &&  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: When the true side fires (W), line 4794's png_do_expand with &(png_ptr->trans_color) is reached; only L takes line 4797's NULL-trans variant.
The L-only line at 4797 is the else-arm that passes NULL for the trans_color, taken only when the blocker is false.
cmplog wins every trial (10/10 resolved) while naive blocks every trial (0/10 resolved, 10/10 blocked) at this branch.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=0/10  blocked=10  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog 10/10 vs value_profile 2/10 — pure CMP_MAP gradient feedback is much weaker than I2S substitution at this gate.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which scans the input for one CMP operand and substitutes the other.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
**Mutators**: naive's havoc + token stack **plus** `I2SRandReplace`.
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mechanism — only havoc + token mutators with no CMP introspection.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace; its CMP_MAP gradient cannot directly substitute a constant byte.

The W-set hits png_do_unpack zero times while L hits it 199 times — L drifted into the bit-packed grayscale path because its color_type 0x00 / low bit_depth seeds take the unpack branch instead of EXPAND_tRNS.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 7294 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 1ae308b366a1ed95` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 8 (ancestor 94c47bff5687a0c9). Cross-checked seed 150ec4117236ded6 (a sibling W seed); its chain converges to the same ancestor at depth 10 with the same dash row, confirming a shared I2S ancestor underlies both winning trajectories.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: If a synthetic harness reduced the gate to `if (in[25] == 0x02)` (a single-byte equality against a constant) and naive still resolved it at parity with cmplog within 12h, the I2S attribution would be falsified — the conjunction structure, not the I2S substitution, would be doing the work.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte diff cleanly shows the IHDR color_type lock-in at 0x19, but the dataflow from input bytes to num_trans (which depends on a downstream tRNS chunk header somewhere later in the file, not in the first 64 bytes shown) is inferred from libpng semantics rather than observed in the BYTE DIFF section.
